use_cases: Displays AI image generation progress with animated gradient text and state-based messaging
Shows loading feedback during AI-powered image creation in chat interfaces
Communicates generation status through animated progress and text transitions
Provides visual feedback for long-running AI operations in creative tools
Delivers status updates in AI chat interfaces with smooth animations
ai_summary: A specialized progress indicator component for AI image generation interfaces featuring animated gradient text, a state-based message system (starting/generating/completed), and a timed progress bar. Designed for seamless integration into AI chat UIs, it provides clear visual feedback during long-running generation tasks with smooth transitions between states.
